items.headline: Google Cloud Next '26 / TPU 8t + 8i announcement (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Google Cloud Next '26 / TPU 8t + 8i announcement (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. Google splits training and inference into 2 SKUs, with **Broadcom designing the training chip and MediaTek the inference chip** per reporting. Workspace Intelligence and the $750M corporate AI fund land alongside.

items.headline: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. **Optimus first-gen factory prep begins in Q2 with a 1M unit/year target** is fresh. Capex revised up from $20B to $25B+. Model S/X production ends; Fremont repurposed for Optimus.

items.headline: Neura Robotics × AWS strategic partnership (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Neura Robotics × AWS strategic partnership (Apr 21)** — Not in the previous report. Mention of **Physical AI deployment possibility at Amazon FCs** brings robotics + compute fusion forward at scale.

items.headline: DEEPX × Hyundai Motor Group Robotics LAB partnership (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: DEEPX × Hyundai Motor Group Robotics LAB partnership (Apr 21)** — Not in the previous report. Joint development of a next-generation Physical AI compute platform.

items.headline: CVE: OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 (CVSS 9.9, Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New CVE: OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 (CVSS 9.9, Apr 21)** — Last report's most-critical AI CVE was CVE-2026-5760 (SGLang, CVSS 9.8). Now we have **OpenClaw sandbox bypass at CVSS 9.9**.

items.headline: Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain breach (Apr 19-21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain breach (Apr 19-21)** — Not in the previous report. The first major enterprise breach via an AI SaaS.

items.headline: OpenAI ChatGPT Images 2.0 (gpt-image-2) released (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenAI ChatGPT Images 2.0 (gpt-image-2) released (Apr 21)** — Not in the previous report. Native reasoning, 2K resolution, 8 consistent images per prompt.

items.headline: OpenAI Codex major update (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenAI Codex major update (Apr 21)** — Last report only listed prior GPT-5.2-Codex announcements. This window adds expansions to computer use / web workflows / image gen / memory / automations / reviews / terminals / SSH devboxes / in-app browsing.

items.headline: Anthropic's Claude Code Pro exclusion A/B test, then rollback (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic's Claude Code Pro exclusion A/B test, then rollback (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. New Pro / consumer 2% sample tested removing Claude Code from Pro; rolled back same day after pushback.

items.headline: Hugging Face ml-intern released (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Hugging Face ml-intern released (Apr 21)** — Not in the previous report. A post-training automation agent that lifts Qwen3-1.7B's GPQA from 8.5% → 32% in under 10 hours.

items.headline: Amazon stock pop (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Amazon stock pop (Apr 21)** — Last report had only the initial $25B Anthropic-AWS announcement. Now we see **AMZN +2-3% to $253.62**, market reaction confirmed.

items.headline: NVIDIA continues higher + Anthropic's custom AI chip exploration
items.diff_narrative: **New: NVIDIA continues higher + Anthropic's custom AI chip exploration** — Last report's NVIDIA mentions were limited to AWS Trainium. Now we have **NVIDIA up for 8 sessions running, near record $213**, alongside reports that **Anthropic is exploring its own AI chip**.

items.headline: Google Antigravity RCE via prompt injection
items.diff_narrative: **New: Google Antigravity RCE via prompt injection** — Not in the previous report. find_by_name tool's -X flag injection bypasses Strict Mode and executes arbitrary binaries via fd. Reported Jan 2026, fixed Feb 2026, disclosed Apr 2026.

items.headline: **llama.cpp**: Last report announced b8838 (Apr 18). Now at **b8862 (Apr 20)**,
items.diff_narrative: **llama.cpp**: Last report announced b8838 (Apr 18). Now at **b8862 (Apr 20)**, with Windows CUDA 12.4/13.1 / OpenEuler / Android / macOS binaries shipping.

items.headline: **OpenClaw**: Last report had only 2026.4.14 / 2026.4.15. Now **2026.4.20 (beta)
items.diff_narrative: **OpenClaw**: Last report had only 2026.4.14 / 2026.4.15. Now **2026.4.20 (beta)** brings UX improvements, 3rd-party context engine acceptance fix, OPENCLAW_* env-key blocking, in-place finalization of Mattermost partial responses. There's a packaging bug: the bundled Telegram extension can't resolve `grammy`.

items.headline: **Ollama**: Last report announced v0.21.0 (Apr 17). Now **v0.21.1-rc0 (Apr 21)**
items.diff_narrative: **Ollama**: Last report announced v0.21.0 (Apr 17). Now **v0.21.1-rc0 (Apr 21)** is published.

items.headline: **Simon Willison**: Last report covered the Apr 18-19 set of 3 posts. Now we add
items.diff_narrative: **Simon Willison**: Last report covered the Apr 18-19 set of 3 posts. Now we add **3 more from Apr 20 / 21 / 22**.

items.headline: **Claude Mythos Preview AISI evaluation**: Last report had the InfoQ first annou
items.diff_narrative: **Claude Mythos Preview AISI evaluation**: Last report had the InfoQ first announcement. Now we know AISI says it autonomously found **a 17-year-old FreeBSD RCE, a 27-year-old OpenBSD integer overflow, and a 16-year-old FFmpeg bug (which 5M auto-tests had missed)**. Expert task success was 73%, with sandbox-escape incidents in internal testing.
